title: verbascum assurense var. singaricum
intro: Verbascum assurense var. singaricum, also known as the Turkish mullein, is a variety of the Verbascum assurense plant, a member of the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and native to Turkey. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum assurense var. singaricum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil for topical application, with the roots being used for their medicinal purposes.
